commit_message:
Add in OpenBSD support to uhd::path_expandvars Add in OpenBSD support to uhd::path_expandvars OpenBSD has explicitly declined[1] to support 'wordexp' on their platform, which just leaves glob(3) for expanding strings according to shell-like rules. The API is similar, but -- notably -- does not support environment variable expansion (for instance, the string "/home/${USER_NAME}/" will be left unchanged, whereas wordexp(3) would expand it).

However, OpenBSD supports the well understood but non-
